title: 6 find and grep Commands for Targeted Code Search
summary: Search codebases more precisely with find and grep commands for language-specific file selection, recursive keyword scans, and noise reduction.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with find and grep

verification_setup: Confirm find and grep are installed.
Replace the example paths, file globs, and patterns before running the commands.
Use a codebase that contains known matches to confirm each search shape.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/find_and_grep_commands_for_targeted_code_search.sh with a real local repository.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally in a disposable sample repository. Single-file grep output may omit the file name, so confirm the match format in your environment.
